title: I Want It That Way
why_this_song: Contrasting 'tell me why' questions with 'I want it that way' assertion. A2 drill on wh-questions and 'that way' demonstrative.
grammar_callouts: Why + present simple questions: tell me why

exercises.prompt_en: Fill the blank in this line:

exercises.teacher_note: Auto-generated from synced lyrics — add the model translation when reviewing.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Match each English word or phrase to its Portuguese meaning.
exercises.prompt_pt: Associe cada palavra ou expressão em inglês ao significado em português.

exercises.prompt_en: Put the words in the right order:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque as palavras na ordem certa:

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "ain't" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "ain't" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: You are (you are, you are, you are)

teaching_notes_md: **Pedagogy:** Use 'ain't' as a register lesson — NEVER in formal writing. Compare with 'isn't' / 'aren't'.
